stories.title: Baseline retrieval evaluation
stories.description: Run an Arize experiment against the legal-rag-bench-qa dataset to establish baseline recall metrics. No code changes — just measure current performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Arize experiment completes against all examples in legal-rag-bench-qa
Recall@1, Recall@5, Recall@10 metrics are recorded in progress.txt

stories.title: Improve retrieval recall@5 above 80%
stories.description: Analyze baseline experiment failures and implement improvements to agent/ retrieval logic and/or index/ pipeline to push Recall@5 above 80%.
acceptanceCriteria: All quality checks pass (lint, typecheck, tests)
